## What & why

## Type

- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Clinical content
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (data-accuracy unit tests + Playwright)
- [ ] Clinical changes cite a primary source and update `docs/CLINICAL_METHODOLOGY.md`
- [ ] No PHI in code, fixtures, or screenshots
- [ ] No new third-party runtime requests; the CSP stays strict
- [ ] Accessibility checked (keyboard, labels, contrast)
